outcomes.rollFlavourText: Block funding cut. Two treatment rooms closed pending review.
Occupancy holds. Patient throughput within expected parameters.
Referral volume up. Waiting room at capacity, which is operationally fine.
Preventive care grant approved. Clinic logs its highest admission week on record.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: RE + MFG hybrid. Monk class (Actuary). STRESS-LINKED LOAN CAPACITY active. Stress determines loan capacity dynamically.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If your current stress is ≤ 2: +1 loan cap on this asset. If stress is 0: +2 loan cap instead. Recalculate each settlement. Actuary CEO's formula determines the full dynamic range. This card grants a flat conditional bonus at fixed thresholds only — the CEO calculates, the card responds.

cardDescription: RE+MFG hybrid asset. Generates modest income from clinic operations across real estate and throughput capacity. Loan capacity scales dynamically with your current stress — the lower your stress, the greater your borrowing ceiling.
flavourText: Health is the one asset that depreciates whether you invest or not.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Regulatory audit triggers mandatory ward closures. Admissions suspended pending compliance sign-off.
Network throughput stable. No material change in bed occupancy or discharge rates.
Elective procedure backlog clears. Surgical suites running at planned utilisation.
New specialist wing opens on schedule. Regional referral network routes to this facility by default.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: RE + MFG hybrid. Monk class (Actuary). STRESS-LINKED LOAN CAPACITY active. Stress determines loan capacity dynamically.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: −1 stress before your death roll once per year. Actuary CEO: this may cancel the roll entirely (per CEO triggered ability). Non-Actuary: reduces stress before roll but cannot prevent the roll if threshold is still met after reduction.
If your current stress is ≤ 2: +1 loan cap on this asset. If stress is 0: +2 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 18.

cardDescription: RE+MFG hybrid asset. Mid-tier hospital network generating income from real estate holdings and operational throughput. Loan capacity is stress-linked — maintaining low stress unlocks higher borrowing thresholds and may enable pre-roll stress reduction via vertical integration.
flavourText: Hospitals are the only business where repeat customers are a failure.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Federal reimbursement rates cut. Three portfolio facilities fall below minimum occupancy threshold.
Portfolio occupancy holds within acceptable variance. Lease renewals proceeding at standard terms.
Aged care demand surge absorbs all available capacity. New admissions deferred to next quarter.
Infrastructure expansion approved across four sites. The REIT posts its highest portfolio valuation on record.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: RE + MFG hybrid. Monk class (Actuary). STRESS-LINKED LOAN CAPACITY ×2 active. Peak Monk synergy at stress 0.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If your current stress is ≤ 2: +2 loan cap on this asset (double the standard threshold bonus). If stress is 0: +4 loan cap. Actuary CEO's $5 longevity bonus stacks with maximum credit at stress 0 — peak Monk synergy.
If you are alive at the final round, this asset's value counts as +3 for scoring.

cardDescription: RE+MFG hybrid asset. Sovereign-tier healthcare REIT combining real estate holdings with large-scale operational capacity. Stress-linked loan capacity doubles at this tier — maximum borrowing ceiling is only achievable at stress 0, making survival the primary leverage condition.
flavourText: The longest-lived patients make the best landlords.
